WebReferences.TitleEn: Elliott, Kari Glynes and Coady, Kyle. Mandatory Minimum Penalties in Canada: Analysis and Annotated Bibliography. Research and Statistics Division, Department of Justice, March 2016.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Elliott, Kari Glynes and Coady, Kyle. Les peines minimales obligatoires au Canada : analyse et bibliographie annotée, Division de la recherche et de la statistique, Ministère de la Justice, mars 2016.
WebReferences.Title: Elliott, Kari Glynes and Coady, Kyle. Mandatory Minimum Penalties in Canada: Analysis and Annotated Bibliography. Research and Statistics Division, Department of Justice, March 2016.

WebReferences.TitleEn: Research and Statistics Division, Department of Justice. “The Impact of Mandatory Minimum Penalties on Indigenous, Black and Other Visible Minorities.” JustFacts, October 2017.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Division de la recherche et de la statistique, Ministère de la Justice. “Les conséquences des peines minimales obligatoires sur les autochtones, les noirs et les autres minorités visibles.” Précis des faits, octobre 2018.
WebReferences.Title: Research and Statistics Division, Department of Justice. “The Impact of Mandatory Minimum Penalties on Indigenous, Black and Other Visible Minorities.” JustFacts, October 2017.
